title: Advisory services
body: We will provide advisory services as specified in your proposal. Advisory work is limited to the agreed scope and does not constitute an audit or assurance engagement unless explicitly stated.

title: Registered office
body: We will provide a registered office address service, forward statutory correspondence, and remind you of key filing deadlines. You must notify us promptly of any changes to directors or shareholders.

title: Third-party reliance
body: Our report or advice is prepared solely for your use. No responsibility is accepted to any third party to whom our work may be shown without our prior written consent.

title: Complaints procedure
body: If you are dissatisfied with our services, please contact us promptly. We operate an internal complaints procedure and will provide details of external redress routes where applicable.

title: Period of engagement
body: This engagement covers the period stated in your proposal. Either party may terminate on reasonable notice; fees for work performed to the date of termination remain payable.
